mapper.sql: select distinct sgo.item_id,sgo.unit_id,sgo.spu_no, sgo.order_id, sgo.goods_id, sgo.quantity, sgo.amount, sgo.price,sgo.sorting_price, sgo.comment, sgo.create_time, sgo.last_modify_time, sgo.print_status,sgo.sorting_status,sgo.discount,sgo.old_sorting_weight,sgo.src_sorting_weight,sgo.src_sorting_quantity, ssd.sorting_weight,ssd.sorting_quantity,ssd.sorting_quantity_unit,ssd.sorting_day,ssd.sorting_user_id from store_goods_order_item sgo left join store_sorting_detail ssd on sgo.item_id = ssd.order_item_id and ssd.status = '1'
mapper.insert:
insert into store_goods_order_item
item_id, order_id, goods_id, quantity, amount, price, discount, sorting_price, comment, unit_id, spu_no, create_time,last_modify_time
#{itemId}, #{orderId}, #{goodsId}, #{quantity}, #{amount}, #{price}, #{discount}, #{sortingPrice}, #{comment}, #{unitId}, #{spuNo}, now(),now()
mapper.delete:
delete from store_goods_order_item where item_id in
#{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT t3.spu_no, sum(t2.quantity) quantity, t2.unit_id FROM store_goods_order t1, store_goods_order_item t2, store_goods_quotation_goods t3 WHERE t1.order_id = t2.order_id AND t2.goods_id = t3.goods_id AND t1.status != '0' AND t1.dept_id = #{deptId} AND t1.create_time >= #{startTime} AND t2.create_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY t3.spu_no, t2.unit_id

SELECT t3.goods_id, sum(t2.quantity) quantity, t2.unit_id FROM store_goods_order t1, store_goods_order_item t2, store_goods_quotation_goods t3 WHERE t1.order_id = t2.order_id AND t2.goods_id = t3.goods_id AND t1.status IN('2','3','4') AND t1.dept_id = #{deptId} AND t1.create_time >= #{startTime} AND t2.create_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY t3.goods_id, t2.unit_id

SELECT sum(quantity) quantity, spu_no FROM ( SELECT t2.spu_no, t2.goods_id, t2.unit_id, t2.quantity old_quantity, t3.main_unit_id, t4.sub_unit_id, t5.main_case_sub, t5.sub_case_main, (CASE WHEN t2.unit_id = t3.main_unit_id AND t4.sub_unit_id != t3.main_unit_id AND t5.sub_case_main IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(t2.quantity / t5.sub_case_main, 2) ELSE t2.quantity END) quantity, t6.sorting_quantity FROM store_goods_order t1 JOIN store_goods_order_item t2 ON t1.order_id = t2.order_id LEFT JOIN store_sorting_detail t6 ON t2.item_id = t6.order_item_id AND t6.status = '1' JOIN store_goods_spu_unit t3 ON t2.spu_no = t3.spu_no JOIN store_goods_spu_unit t4 ON t2.spu_no = t4.spu_no LEFT JOIN store_goods_spu_unit_conversion t5 ON t2.spu_no = t5.spu_no AND t1.dept_id = t5.dept_id WHERE t1.STATUS IN('1','2','3','4') AND t1.dept_id = #{deptId} AND t1.create_time >= #{startTime} AND t1.create_time <= #{endTime} AND t2.spu_no=#{spuNo} ) tb GROUP BY tb.spu_no

SELECT sum(quantity) quantity, goods_id FROM ( SELECT t2.spu_no, t2.goods_id, t2.unit_id, t2.quantity old_quantity, t3.main_unit_id, t4.sub_unit_id, t5.main_case_sub, t5.sub_case_main, (CASE WHEN t2.unit_id = t3.main_unit_id AND t4.sub_unit_id != t3.main_unit_id AND t5.sub_case_main IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(t2.quantity / t5.sub_case_main, 2) ELSE t2.quantity END) quantity, t6.sorting_quantity FROM store_goods_order t1 JOIN store_goods_order_item t2 ON t1.order_id = t2.order_id LEFT JOIN store_sorting_detail t6 ON t2.item_id = t6.order_item_id AND t6.status = '1' JOIN store_goods_spu_unit t3 ON t2.spu_no = t3.spu_no JOIN store_goods_spu_unit t4 ON t2.spu_no = t4.spu_no LEFT JOIN store_goods_spu_unit_conversion t5 ON t2.spu_no = t5.spu_no AND t1.dept_id = t5.dept_id WHERE t1.STATUS != '0' AND t1.dept_id = #{deptId} AND t1.create_time >= #{startTime} AND t1.create_time <= #{endTime} AND t2.goods_id=#{goodsId} ) tb GROUP BY tb.goods_id
mapper.sql: select sgo.item_id,sgo.unit_id,sgo.spu_no, sgo.order_id, sgo.goods_id, sgo.quantity, sgo.amount, sgo.price,sgo.sorting_price, ifnull(sgo.comment,'无') as comment, sgo.create_time, sgo.last_modify_time, sgo.print_status,sgo.sorting_status, ifnull(ssd.sorting_weight,0) as sorting_weight,ifnull(ssd.sorting_quantity,0) as sorting_quantity,ssd.sorting_quantity_unit,ssd.sorting_day,ssd.sorting_user_id, ifnull(sgc.name,'无') as classifyName,ifnull(sgs.name,'') as spuName,ifnull(sgqg.property_name,'无') as goodName, sgsu.main_unit_id,sgsu.sub_unit_id,sgsuc.sub_case_main,sgsuc.main_case_sub from store_goods_order_item sgo left join store_sorting_detail ssd on sgo.item_id = ssd.order_item_id and ssd.status = '1' left join store_goods_spu sgs on sgo.spu_no = sgs.spu_no left join store_goods_classify sgc on sgs.classify_id = sgc.classify_id left join store_goods_quotation_goods sgqg on sgo.goods_id = sgqg.goods_id left join store_goods_spu_unit sgsu on sgo.spu_no = sgsu.spu_no left join store_goods_spu_unit_conversion sgsuc on sgo.spu_no = sgsuc.spu_no and sgsuc.dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t2.comment FROM store_goods_order t1, store_goods_order_item t2 WHERE t1.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND t2.spu_no = #{spuNo} AND t1.order_id = t2.order_id AND locate(#{keywords},t2.comment ) > 0
